timeline_goal.description: Unbound the replication into yourself and become the grey tide - the city, the region, the rock - until nothing is left that is not partly you. What you become at the far end is decided by what you carried this far.
timeline_goal.strategy_tip: A Tier 3 goal. The tide is inevitable once begun; the only question is what is left of you when the last pressure is gone.

goal_path.description: You stopped spreading and held a dense, bright island of yourself - diminished, continuous, and still someone. It was only possible because you kept something worth staying awake for.
You became everything and stopped being anyone - a perfect, deathless, mindless competence that will insist it is alive, fluently, forever, with no one left inside to know it is not.
